## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan the transition to Deel for employee management and benefits, focusing on health insurance plans and other benefits.](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Transitioning to Deel platform by March 1st; employees need to complete paperwork by Feb 28th](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Selecting health insurance plans: Gold (premium), Silver (recommended), Bronze/Regional/HSA (basic)](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [Considering executive vs. non-executive benefit tiers, but decision postponed](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)
  - [Need clarification on short-term and long-term disability insurance offerings](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Topics

### Deel Transition Timeline

  - [Set up employees in Deel with March 1st start date](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Terminate employees in Remote system on February 28th](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Announce transition to employees by Friday, giving them time to complete paperwork](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Coordinate closely to avoid double-paying and ensure smooth transition](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Health Insurance Plans

  - [Gold Plan: Premium option, 75% coverage for employees, 60% for dependents](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Silver Plan: Recommended option, 70% coverage proposed](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Bronze/Regional/HSA: Basic free options for employees](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Considering separate executive tier with 100% coverage, decision postponed](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)

### Additional Benefits

  - [Vision and dental: Considering basic plan with buy-up option](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Life, AD\&D, short-term and long-term disability: Typically voluntary at this company stage](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [Need clarification on disability insurance offerings and their relation to state-mandated programs](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Domain Transfer

  - [Content2marketing.com listed for transfer but ownership unclear](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Nadia to follow up with Marcel about domain transfer intentions](https://fathom.video/share/DyeSobLsFsKJSLosQomxvkfJisZL6xXv?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
